title: Image Generation
summary: Generates images from text prompts via FAL.ai with nine selectable models ranging from sub-second fast generators to SOTA typography and photorealism models; model selection, aspect ratios, and upscaling are all configurable.

env_vars.name: FAL_KEY
env_vars.purpose: FAL.ai API key for direct image generation

env_vars.name: FAL_IMAGE_MODEL
env_vars.purpose: Override active image model via environment

env_vars.name: IMAGE_TOOLS_DEBUG
env_vars.purpose: Enable debug logging for image generation

cli_commands.purpose: Navigate to Image Generation to pick model and backend

config_keys.description: Use Nous Portal Tool Gateway instead of direct FAL credentials

gotchas: FAL URLs expire after hours/days — save locally if needed
GPT-Image quality is pinned to `medium` on Nous Portal; cannot select low/high tiers
Upscaling only runs for `fal-ai/flux-2-pro` (backward compat); all other models skip it
Unsupported model parameters are silently dropped via `supports` filter
GPT Image 2 uses 4:3 presets instead of 16:9 (minimum pixel count constraint)
full_text:
# Image Generation

Hermes Agent generates images from text prompts via FAL.ai. Nine models are supported out of the box.

## Supported Models

| Model | Speed | Strengths | Price |
|---|---|---|---|
| `fal-ai/flux-2/klein/9b` (default) | <1s | Fast, crisp text | $0.006/MP |
| `fal-ai/flux-2-pro` | ~6s | Studio photorealism | $0.03/MP |
| `fal-ai/z-image/turbo` | ~2s | Bilingual EN/CN, 6B params | $0.005/MP |
| `fal-ai/nano-banana-pro` | ~8s | Gemini 3 Pro, reasoning depth | $0.15/image |
| `fal-ai/gpt-image-1.5` | ~15s | Prompt adherence | $0.034/image |
| `fal-ai/gpt-image-2` | ~20s | SOTA text rendering + CJK | $0.04-0.06/image |
| `fal-ai/ideogram/v3` | ~5s | Best typography | $0.03-0.09/image |
| `fal-ai/recraft/v4/pro/text-to-image` | ~8s | Design/brand systems | $0.25/image |
| `fal-ai/qwen-image` | ~12s | LLM-based, complex text | $0.02/MP |

## Setup

```bash
# ~/.hermes/.env
FAL_KEY=your-fal-api-key
```

Or use Nous Portal subscription (no FAL key needed; uses Tool Gateway).

```bash
hermes tools   # Navigate to Image Generation to pick model
```

Config saved to:
```yaml
image_gen:
  model: fal-ai/flux-2/klein/9b
  use_gateway: false
```

## Aspect Ratios

| Agent input | flux/z-image/qwen/recraft/ideogram | nano-banana-pro | gpt-image-1.5 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `landscape` | `landscape_16_9` | `16:9` | `1536x1024` |
| `square` | `square_hd` | `1:1` | `1024x1024` |
| `portrait` | `portrait_16_9` | `9:16` | `1024x1536` |

## Automatic Upscaling

Only `fal-ai/flux-2-pro` is upscaled (2x via FAL Clarity Upscaler). All other models skip upscaling.

## Platform Delivery

| Platform | Delivery |
|---|---|
| CLI | Image URL as markdown `![](url)` |
| Telegram | Photo message with prompt as caption |
| Discord | Embedded in message |
| WhatsApp | Media message |

## Debugging

```bash
export IMAGE_TOOLS_DEBUG=true
# Logs to ./logs/image_tools_debug_<session_id>.json
```

## Limitations

- Text-to-image only (no inpainting, img2img)
- FAL URLs expire after hours/days
- Per-model param constraints silently enforced via `supports` filter
- GPT-Image quality pinned to `medium` on Nous Portal (predictable billing)
